feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! È la prima domanda da fare per trovarsi nel posto giusto.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Where does the visit start?'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! It's the first question to ask to be in the right place.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Dove inizia la visita?'.

choicesEnglish: How long does the tour last?
correctAnswerEnglish: How long does the tour last?

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Sapere la durata aiuta a pianificare la giornata.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'How long does the tour last?'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! Knowing the duration helps in planning the day.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Quanto dura il tour?'.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Chiedere il permesso per le foto è sempre educato.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Can I take photos?'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! Asking permission for photos is always polite.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Posso scattare foto?'.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! È fondamentale sapere dove trovarsi con la guida.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Where is the meeting point?'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! It's essential to know where to meet the guide.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Dov'è il punto d'incontro?'.

feedback.correctItalian: Bravo! L'ombrello è il punto di riferimento per non perdersi.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Follow the colored umbrella.'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Well done! The umbrella is the reference point to not get lost.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Seguite l'ombrello colorato.'.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Una pausa è utile per riposarsi o scattare foto.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Will we take a break?'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! A break is useful for resting or taking photos.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Faremo una pausa?'.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! La guida chiede spesso se il gruppo ha curiosità.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Do you have any questions?'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! The guide often asks if the group has any curiosities.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Avete delle domande?'.

choicesEnglish: I can't hear the voice well.
correctAnswerEnglish: I can't hear the voice well.

feedback.correctItalian: Corretto! È importante segnalare se l'auricolare non funziona.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'I can't hear the voice well.'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Correct! It's important to report if the headset isn't working.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Non sento bene la voce.'.

feedback.correctItalian: Bene! Bisogna scegliere il canale giusto per sentire la guida.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Tune in to channel three.'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Good! You need to choose the right channel to hear the guide.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Sintonizzatevi sul canale tre.'.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Magari per guardare meglio un monumento o fare una foto.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Can we stop here?'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! Maybe to look better at a monument or take a photo.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Possiamo fermarci qui?'.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Una domanda pratica essenziale durante una lunga visita.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Where are the restrooms?'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! An essential practical question during a long visit.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Dove sono i servizi?'.

choicesEnglish: Is it possible to ask questions?
correctAnswerEnglish: Is it possible to ask questions?

feedback.correctItalian: Corretto! La guida risponderà volentieri alle vostre curiosità.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Is it possible to ask questions?'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Correct! The guide will gladly answer your curiosities.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'È possibile fare domande?'.

feedback.correctItalian: Bene! In Italia l'acqua delle fontanelle è quasi sempre sicura.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Is the water drinkable?'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Good! In Italy, fountain water is almost always safe.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'L'acqua è potabile?'.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Esprimere apprezzamento rende il tour più piacevole.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'I like this palace.'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! Expressing appreciation makes the tour more pleasant.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Mi piace questo palazzo.'.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Una domanda classica sulla storia di un monumento.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'How old is it?'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! A classic question about the history of a monument.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Quanto è antico?'.

feedback.correctItalian: Bene! Chiedere dell'architetto o del creatore è molto comune.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Who built it?'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Good! Asking about the architect or creator is very common.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Chi l'ha costruito?'.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Molti monumenti italiani hanno stili molto particolari.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'It's a unique style.'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! Many Italian monuments have very particular styles.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'È uno stile unico.'.

feedback.correctItalian: Bene! Il modo educato per attirare l'attenzione della guida.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Excuse me, guide.'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Good! The polite way to get the guide's attention.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Mi scusi, guida.'.

choicesEnglish: Let's wait for the rest of the group.
correctAnswerEnglish: Let's wait for the rest of the group.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! È importante non lasciare indietro nessuno.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Let's wait for the rest of the group.'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! It's important not to leave anyone behind.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Aspettiamo il resto del gruppo.'.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Quando tutti sono pronti, il tour continua.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'We can proceed.'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! When everyone is ready, the tour continues.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Possiamo proseguire.'.

feedback.correctItalian: Bene! I dettagli rendono i monumenti incredibili.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Look at those decorations!'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Good! The details make the monuments incredible.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Guarda quelle decorazioni!'.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Spesso l'ingresso è la parte più decorata dell'edificio.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'It's the main entrance.'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! Often the entrance is the most decorated part of the building.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'È l'ingresso principale.'.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Una reazione comune davanti a una bella vista dall'alto.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'What an incredible panorama!'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! A common reaction in front of a beautiful view from above.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Che panorama incredibile!'.

feedback.correctItalian: Bene! Domanda fondamentale per entrare nei musei o palazzi.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Where can I buy tickets?'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Good! Fundamental question to enter museums or palaces.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Dove si comprano i biglietti?'.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Dopo aver salito le scale di una torre o collina.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'We arrived at the top.'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! After climbing the stairs of a tower or hill.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Siamo arrivati in cima.'.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! È gentile ringraziare la guida dopo aver ascoltato.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Thanks for the explanation.'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! It's polite to thank the guide after listening.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Grazie per la spiegazione.'.

feedback.correctItalian: Bene! Chiedere l'orario di partenza per essere puntuali.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'What time do we leave?'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Good! Asking the departure time to be on time.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'A che ora partiamo?'.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! La guida controlla se manchi qualcuno del gruppo.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Are we all here?'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! The guide checks if anyone from the group is missing.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Siamo al completo?'.

feedback.correctItalian: Bene! Per dare tempo ai ritardatari di arrivare.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Let's wait two more minutes.'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Good! To give latecomers time to arrive.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Aspettiamo ancora due minuti.'.

choicesEnglish: Can I refill my water bottle?
correctAnswerEnglish: Can I refill my water bottle?

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Chiedere se si può usare la fontanella vicina.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Can I refill my water bottle?'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! Asking if you can use the nearby fountain.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Posso riempire la borraccia?'.

feedback.correctItalian: Bene! Spesso i monumenti hanno storie fantastiche associate.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'What is the legend?'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Good! Often monuments have fantastic stories associated with them.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Qual è la leggenda?'.

choicesEnglish: Is there time for a photo?
correctAnswerEnglish: Is there time for a photo?

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Chiedere alla guida prima di fermarsi a scattare.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Is there time for a photo?'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! Asking the guide before stopping to take a shot.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'C'è tempo per una foto?'.

choicesEnglish: Is it possible to go inside?
correctAnswerEnglish: Is it possible to go inside?

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Alcuni tour includono solo l'esterno degli edifici.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Is it possible to go inside?'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! Some tours only include the exterior of buildings.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'È possibile entrare dentro?'.

choicesEnglish: I want to buy a souvenir.
I want to buy a book.
I want to buy a newspaper.
I want to buy an ice cream.
correctAnswerEnglish: I want to buy a souvenir.

feedback.correctItalian: Bene! Per portare a casa un ricordo del tour.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'I want to buy a souvenir.'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Good! To take home a memory of the tour.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Voglio comprare un ricordino.'.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! La regola numero uno per non perdersi nel centro storico.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Always follow the guide.'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! Rule number one for not getting lost in the historic center.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Seguite sempre la guida.'.

feedback.correctItalian: Bene! Un avviso di sicurezza comune in edifici antichi.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Watch out for the steps.'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Good! A common safety warning in ancient buildings.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Attenzione agli scalini.'.

choicesItalian: Tenete il biglietto a portata di mano.
correctAnswerItalian: Tenete il biglietto a portata di mano.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Potrebbe servire per i controlli all'ingresso.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Keep the ticket handy.'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! It might be needed for entry checks.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Tenete il biglietto a portata di mano.'.

choicesEnglish: Don't wander off from the group.
correctAnswerEnglish: Don't wander off from the group.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Fondamentale per la sicurezza e l'organizzazione.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Don't wander off from the group.'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! Essential for safety and organization.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Non allontanatevi dal gruppo.'.

choicesEnglish: Which is the royal coat of arms?
correctAnswerEnglish: Which is the royal coat of arms?

feedback.correctItalian: Bene! Per identificare il simbolo della famiglia nobile.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Which is the royal coat of arms?'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Good! To identify the symbol of the noble family.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Qual è lo stemma reale?'.

choicesEnglish: We will see the palace from the outside.
correctAnswerEnglish: We will see the palace from the outside.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Quando il tour non include l'ingresso all'interno.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'We will see the palace from the outside.'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! When the tour doesn't include entry inside.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Vedremo il palazzo dall'esterno.'.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Per chiedere alla guida di aspettare un istante.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'One moment, please.'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! To ask the guide to wait a moment.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Un momento, per favore.'.

choicesEnglish: Can I refill the bottle here?
correctAnswerEnglish: Can I refill the bottle here?

feedback.correctItalian: Bene! Chiedere se l'acqua della fontanella è buona.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Can I refill the bottle here?'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Good! Asking if the fountain water is good.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Posso riempire la bottiglia qui?'.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Un complimento per il lavoro della guida.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'The guide explains very well.'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! A compliment for the guide's work.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'La guida spiega molto bene.'.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Spesso richiesto all'interno di chiese o musei.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Flash photography forbidden.'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! Often required inside churches or museums.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Vietato usare il flash.'.

choicesEnglish: Is there time for a stop?
correctAnswerEnglish: Is there time for a stop?

feedback.correctItalian: Bene! Se il gruppo è stanco e ha bisogno di riposare.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Is there time for a stop?'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Good! If the group is tired and needs to rest.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'C'è tempo per una sosta?'.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! L'ordine tipico di una guida turistica.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Follow my umbrella.'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! The typical order from a tour guide.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Seguite il mio ombrello.'.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Chiedere della prossima tappa del tour.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Where are we going now?'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! Asking about the next stop of the tour.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Dove andiamo adesso?'.

feedback.correctItalian: Bene! Esprimere interesse per quanto spiegato.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'It's a fascinating story.'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Good! Expressing interest in what was explained.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'È una storia affascinante.'.

choicesEnglish: I got lost for a moment.
correctAnswerEnglish: I got lost for a moment.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Se non vedi più l'ombrello colorato.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'I got lost for a moment.'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! If you no longer see the colored umbrella.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Mi sono perso un attimo.'.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Per sapere come lasciare l'edificio alla fine.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Where is the palace exit?'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! To know how to leave the building at the end.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Dov'è l'uscita del palazzo?'.

feedback.correctItalian: Bene! Molti palazzi hanno giardini splendidi.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Can we see the garden?'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Good! Many palaces have splendid gardens.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Possiamo vedere il giardino?'.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! La guida conta i partecipanti prima di ripartire.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Are you all here?'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! The guide counts the participants before leaving again.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Siete tutti qui?'.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Per sintonizzare correttamente l'auricolare.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Which is the right channel?'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! To correctly tune the headset.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Qual è il canale giusto?'.

feedback.correctItalian: Bene! Confermare che il sistema audio funziona bene.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'The voice is very clear.'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Good! Confirming that the audio system is working well.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'La voce è molto chiara.'.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Annuncio della guida per scattare immagini.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Let's take a photo break.'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! Guide's announcement to take pictures.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Facciamo una sosta foto.'.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Gli aneddoti rendono la storia più viva.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Are there any funny anecdotes?'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! Anecdotes make history more alive.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Ci sono aneddoti divertenti?'.

feedback.correctItalian: Bene! Possiamo iniziare la visita.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'The group is all here.'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Good! We can start the visit.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Il gruppo è al completo.'.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Per sentire la spiegazione della guida.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Take a headset.'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! To hear the guide's explanation.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Prendete un auricolare.'.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Le fontanelle italiane offrono spesso acqua ottima.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Is it fresh water?'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! Italian fountains often offer excellent water.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'È acqua fresca?'.

feedback.correctItalian: Bene! Per sapere dove ci lascerà la guida alla fine.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Where does the tour end?'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Good! To know where the guide will leave us at the end.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Dove termina il tour?'.

choicesEnglish: Look at 그 coat of arms!
correctAnswerEnglish: Look at that coat of arms!

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Indica la famiglia nobile che viveva nel palazzo.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Look at that coat of arms!'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! It indicates the noble family that lived in the palace.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Guarda quello stemma!'.

choicesEnglish: Can we refill the water bottles?
correctAnswerEnglish: Can we refill the water bottles?

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Fare rifornimento d'acqua prima di iniziare a camminare.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Can we refill the water bottles?'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! Refilling water before starting to walk.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Possiamo riempire le borracce?'.

feedback.correctItalian: Bene! L'ultimo momento per chiarire dubbi o curiosità.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Are there any final questions?'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Good! The last moment to clarify doubts or curiosities.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Ci sono domande finali?'.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! La frase conclusiva della guida.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'The guided tour is over.'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! The guide's concluding phrase.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Il tour guidato è finito.'.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Un saluto cortese per congedarsi dal gruppo.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa 'Goodbye everyone.'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! A polite greeting to take leave of the group.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'Arrivederci a tutti.'.
